title: App Settings - General - Account - Account delete
scenario: Account deletion via Settings > General > Account removes user from Cloud and logs them out after confirmation
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Log in to the Lens tenant.
3. Navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
4. Tap the delete icon (trash/bin icon) next to your account.
5. In the confirmation dialog that appears, tap the Cancel button.
6. Observe that the dialog closes and you are returned to Settings → General with the Account tab expanded.
7. Verify that you remain logged in and your account is still present on the Cloud.
8. Navigate back to App Settings → General → Account and tap the delete icon again.
9. In the confirmation dialog, tap the Confirm button.
10. Observe that a spinner appears briefly, followed by an "Account Deleted" popup that appears and then disappears.
11. Observe that you are moved back to Settings → General with the Account tab expanded.
12. Verify that you are now logged out and your account is no longer present on the Cloud.
expected: Cancel button: Dialog closes, user returns to Settings > General with Account tab expanded, user remains logged in and account still present on Cloud. Confirm button: Spinner appears, then "Account Deleted" popup appears briefly, user is moved back to Settings > General with Account tab expanded, user is logged out and account no longer present on Cloud.
